title: St. America
lyrics: They gone, they gone, they gone, they gone, going out for the motherfucker gone, you know what I'm saying? Can you hear the s-s-s-s-s-s-s-s-song? The song? The ones be gone, motherfuckers, the ones be gone They be taking off, you know, oh yeah, never gonna see But I got the cellphone, you know what I'm saying? Thinking about the day you went away, oh yeah, oh yeah, you're gone, forever Got so much to fucking say, oh yeah Every day we walking by, I see you in my room with me I just wanna know if you cry like I cry when you aren't near Oh, gone, walking, again, back, going, walked your way out And when you're back, try to make it better Try to fit the cheddar, pick up cheddar Put you in the foot and make it all smaller Swapping on you, I'm getting stedder Baby, what the fuck you wanna do, huh? You coming with me or not, or not? You're gonna drop it or not, or not? I'm falling eclectic, I'll call it a massacre, call it a testicle Break it in, better than what you in I mean, you know I'm better Bake it, make it, take it Just the next level, can you time it? Baby, can you hear it? I said, can you, can you, can you hear it? Yeah Just a little bit of that Mexican flavor Come back for later and we'll do it We love taking it and everything, making it Can you have it? Can you hear it? Make you feeling when you're with the dealers Got the dealers I'm the realest Smoke a little bit, man, that's the feeling Come on, dance with me When we're rolling down the radio Rolling on the stereo Rolling to burning, man Sipping your vine All one line, in that kind of style of line Yeah, pop it, feel the flying Them Asian boys are rolling Can you hear them? OD's screaming OD's screaming, come along with me and sing Can you hear it? Can you hear it?
